name: Porowyn's Loop
desc: Well well. Here we are. With the network nearly complete, the next phase is close at hand. It is time we discussed some of the... bigger picture.

dialogue.character: I couldn't have imagined a better companion in this endeavor. What we have achieved here... will connect us into the far tomorrows.

name: Orbital Patrol
desc: A planet of one of our allies has been a target of small attacks recently. They are offering rewards for ships to provide temporary defense.

perRoundMessages.text: A legion of ships attacks you and other defenders. Your ship takes damage.
You have finished one round of patrols.

risks: Potential for incoming planet attack (minor damage)

name: Shipment Delivery
desc: Our main trade outpost needs some shipments delivered to a nearby starbase

perRoundMessages.text: We have finished one round of shipments to the starbase

completionText: All shipments to the starbase have been delivered

completionReward.text: The starbase provides a bonus for completing the shipments

name: Escort a Frigate
desc: Some trade routes have become quite hostile and our frigates are spread thin. Escort one of the ships for a reward.

perRoundMessages.text: You continue to escort the frigate safely

completionText: You have finished helping the frigate with its route

name: The Glaviz Incident
desc: Inergon, I'll be brief. A ceremonial device of unspeakable value was plundered from our homeworld. The technology capable of pulling off such an act is beyond even our greatest spies. We have faint readings from a vessel that escaped - please find them.

perRoundMessages.text: You continue your intense search for the escaped vessel.

completionText: The ship trail runs cold, but you discover a strange device...

name: The Zolazin Pursuit
desc: The Zolazin?? This is troubling. They are a band of renegade cyborgs - plundering the finest technology the galaxy has to offer. Finding them is impossible...but...disabling some of their remote sensory grids might bring them to us. Hurry.

perRoundMessages.text: You continue in search of a Zolazin analyzer node.

completionReward.text: You deactivate the Zolazin Analyzer (artifact), and place it in your cargo bay.

completionText: You discover a Zolazin Analyzer node.

name: The Genoform Surge
desc: We... apologize for the disturbance. A malfunction of considerable severity resulted in a leaking of energies from... where we come from. We are in the process of sealing the breach, but there will be some unintended side effects in this region of space.

completionReward.text: You have finished assisting the research effort...

perRoundMessages.text: You continue to assist with Genoform research...

dialogue.character: Rest assured that we mean your Galaxy no harm.
dialogue.player: Who are you? Where did you come from?

dialogue.character: It is best that we remain discreet about our origins... for now.
dialogue.player: What kind of malfunction could cause such a spacial rupture?

dialogue.character: One of our Genoform Engines. An experimental mishap caused the tear.
dialogue.player: What do these... Genoform Engines do?

dialogue.character: Their primary purpose is to accelerate growth across the Galaxies we inhabit. Recently we've been performing high-energy experiments with them.
Which resulted in an environmental catastrophe on our end. Over here... the effects will be... unpredictable.
The Genoform Field strength here should be safe, though it can speed up mutations, genetic changes, and autocatalytic evolution among your species.
Still, as we must finish repairs on the Engine... the surge will not last.
dialogue.player: Can we travel through the aperture? Visit your side?

dialogue.character: I'm afraid not. I have been tasked with guarding the rupture until it is closed. But... you could still be of considerable assistance to us.
There is an opportunity to study the effects of the Genoform Surge on the species here. We would very much like to learn what we can.
dialogue.player: That could be agreeable. We'd be willing to exchange research.

dialogue.character: We are pleased to hear that.
dialogue.player: We'd still like to learn more about you before the rupture closes.

dialogue.character: In time. I would not be surprised if such an incident occurred again... given our frequency of such experiments. Perhaps we will meet again.

name: Ascendancy Directives
desc: Your deeds have garnered the attention of some Galactic power brokers... ones that may help expand our influence. I have scheduled an audience with leaders of these factions: see what they have to offer.

perRoundMessages.message: You continue to seek audience with influential leaders...

completionReward.message: You have established relations with influential leaders...

dialogue.character: Many of these leaders have Seats on Galactic councils. Some are powerful lobbyists. It is time that we garner some of this power.
dialogue.player: I already have a great deal of planetary might, and allies.

dialogue.character: That may be true, but we need Galactic influence... strong enough to shape the will of governments. Power that does not come from your factories and labs alone.
dialogue.player: I've met with many such leaders before.

dialogue.character: And you will do so again. It is time to establish new Charters on worlds ideal for gatherings among the Galactic populace.
Lower gravity worlds are usually picked for this purpose, such as ones typically smaller. There are other candidates, as well.
dialogue.player: I'll see what I can find.

dialogue.character: I'll prepare the schedule. Good luck.
